name: WW-Beef Barley Soup
recipeIngredient: 4 packets instant beef broth and seasoning mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, combine the broth mix and water. Heat.
2. Add the remaining ingredients except parsley, partially cover the pan, and let simmer until the vegetables are tender (about 40 minutes).
3. Remove and discard the bay leaf.
4. Serve the soup sprinkled with parsley.
